user.title: Connect to rtl_433 server
user.description: Enter the connection details for the rtl_433 server's HTTP/WebSocket API.

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the rtl_433 server.
data_description.port: The port the rtl_433 HTTP server is listening on.
data_description.path: The WebSocket path on the rtl_433 HTTP server.
data_description.secure: Connect over an encrypted WebSocket (wss://) instead of ws://.
